Dhibcaha la kaydiyay ayaa la muujiyay, laakiin ma jiro qaab wax-is-xajin ah oo la dabaqay. Dhibcaha wax lagu hagaajinayo ma jiraan Ku dar jaangooyooyin karti leh si loo eego moodeelka. Waxaad u baahan tahay ugu yaraan laba dhibcood oo firfircoon si aad u hesho khad taam ah. Hal-dhibcood oo kabaxsan; majiro khad jiirar ah. Ku hay kuwa la damiyay taariikhda Dhibcaha la damiyay saameyn kuma yeeshaan akhrinnada dambe, laakiin waxay ku sii jiraan taariikhda hore ee xiran. U keydi dhibcaha cabbirka iyo dhaqanka JSON ahaan. Ku dar dhibcaha astaanta adoon tirtirin kulammada jira. Beddel astaanta cabbirka dareemayaasha. Tixraaca la isku raacsan yahay ee AGP Bartilmaameedyada lagu sheegay warbixintan waxay raacaan qaabka AGP-ga heshiis caalami ah: TIR 70-180 mg/dL (3.9-10.0 mmol/L), TBR <70 iyo <54 mg/dL, TAR>180 and>250 mg/dL, with CV goal <=36%%. JugglucoNG Lifaaqa I - AGP iyo Miisaska maalinlaha ah Boqolleyda saacadle ah iyo natiijooyinka heerka maalinta Shaxda profile AGP ee saacadle ah Saacada Tusaalooyinka IQR (P25-P75) Ma jiraan sanduuqyo AGP-ga oo saacadle ah oo laga heli karo xadkan. Shaxda natiijooyinka maalinlaha ah Muujinaya %1$d ugu dambeeyay ee %2$d maalmood. JugglucoNG Lifaaqa II - Dhacdooyinka iyo Xogaha Maalinlaha ah Halbeegyada muujinta Hypo/hyper iyo jaantusyada profile-heer-maalin Dhacdooyinka soo-gaadhista hypo/hyper Saacadaha/maalintii Dhacdooyinka/maalintii Celceliska muddada (h) Tilmaamaha gulukooska ee maalinlaha ah Qari qiyamka isha Muuji kaliya qiyamka la isku hagaajiyay marka cabbiriddu darto.
